## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences: what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Standards corpus update
- [ ] Infra / CI
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] New / changed code is covered by tests
- [ ] If touching standards corpus: re-ran `make corpus-validate`
- [ ] If touching the DB schema: included an Alembic migration
- [ ] Updated `docs/` if user-facing behaviour changed
